nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: POST to /webhook/grok-research with JSON body: { topic, modules, depth, language, brand }

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, input: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }], tools: [{ type: 'web_search' }] }) }}

nodes.name: Grok API Call
nodes.notes: Set HTTP Header Auth credential with: Name='Authorization', Value='Bearer YOUR_XAI_API_KEY'
